PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emily Foehr, via ZOOM, counsel for Andrea Witherill, Conservator.

At the onset, the court advises counsel that the court's main concern in this matter is the bond amount based on anticipated liabilities to the IRS and Franchise Tax Board. Counsel reports that she is uncertain of any liabilities but advises the court that the will waives bond. Counsel is advised that the court is inclined to set a bond amount, regardless. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel that bond will be set by the court at $110,000.

The court confirms that there are no objections. The Will dated August 10, 2006 is admitted to Probate. Andrea Witherill is appointed executor with full IAEA authority. Bond is set at $110,000. Frank Mahoney is appointed probate referee. Status on close of Estate is set for May 16, 2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Continued To May-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
